title: YMCA GYM — Mama on treadmill
prompt: Wide shot in @ymca-gym, fluorescent overhead lighting, rows of treadmills. @Mama in the CENTER runs on a treadmill in workout gear, ponytail bouncing, but her face is EXHAUSTED — eyes glazed, staring at the wall clock visible above the treadmill. The clock reads 9:47. Sweat drips. Mama (panting, talking to herself): "Twelve minutes... twelve minutes... twelve minutes till coffee..." Solo shot — only Mama in frame, no other gym members visible.
